items.claim: Ezra Elliott has a high-level wrestling background as a former high school state champion.
items.quote: He's originally from Illinois and he's a state champion wrestler in high school.

items.claim: Ezra Elliott has a strong grappling skill set, including success in EBI-style tournaments.
items.quote: He ended up competing in some like 80CC style tournaments in the US and has a win over their East Coast trials winner.

items.claim: Ezra Elliott has finished all seven of his professional fights in the first round.
items.quote: All seven of his wins as a pro have been inside the very first round.

items.claim: Damen Anderson is a high-level grappler with a background as a BJJ black belt.
items.quote: Damen Anderson, meanwhile, he's also undefeated. He's a BJ Black belt.

items.claim: Damen Anderson is at a size disadvantage because he is moving up from bantamweight to fight at featherweight.
items.quote: All of his fights in his pro career have been at bantamweight... In the case of Damen Anderson, this fight's at 145.

items.claim: Ezra Elliott has a significant size advantage over Damen Anderson in this matchup.
items.quote: The difference is that one of them's a really good-look featherweight prospect and one of them's a pretty good bantamweight prospect.

items.claim: Ezra Elliott's wrestling and striking credentials are superior to Damen Anderson's.
items.quote: Ezra Elliott, who's a state wrestling champion in Illinois, on paper, he's got the better wrestling and on paper, he's got the better striking
